case_title: FRAGOSO ANA MARIA VS ESKSTEIN GLORIA E. DBA ROCKIN ROBIN DOWNTOWN et al

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ESKSTEIN GLORIA E. DBA ROCKIN ROBIN DOWNTOWN

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,802.40 FILED BY FRAGOSO ANA MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT ESKSTEIN GLORIA E. DBA ROCKIN ROBIN DOWNTOWN . ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-09-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRAGOSO ANA MARIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESKSTEIN GLORIA E. DBA ROCKIN ROBIN DOWNTOWN . STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
